case_title: FERNANDO L. PUGLISI VS. LUI WONG

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,995.00 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON 09/01/2016. (LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERIFF RETAINED POSSESSION OF ORIGINAL WRIT PER CCP 263.7) AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LUI
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR PUGLISI, FERNANDO L. ASSIGNED TO SUTTON, RACHEL DBA VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY PUGLISI, FERNANDO L. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 145.00 - SERVED AUG-21-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LUI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PUGLISI, FERNANDO L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, LUI $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $400.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LUI
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE SUTTON, RACHEL DBA VAN NUYS FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, LUI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2014 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NO REPORTED. (506)
